type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous assessment only had two dust collectors and one was decommissioned in 2024, however, based on the ESDM report, there was actually three dust collectors.  Therefore another dust collector was added to the assessment.  Emissions were also updated to reflect the most recent ESDM report.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous assessment only had two dust collectors and one was decommissioned in 2024, however, based on the ESDM report, there was actually three dust collectors.  Therefore another dust collector was added to the assessment.  Emissions were also updated to reflect the most recent ESDM report.
